docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,970.04 FILED BY FITZGERALD, DARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT DEMORE, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FITZGERALD, DARLENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEMORE, DANIEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REM: REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE BY PLTF IS UNTIMELY & WILL BE RULED ON THE TRIAL DATE.
PLAINTIFF DANIEL DEMOR REQUEST TO CONTINUE HEARING DATE TO SEPTEMBER 8, 2000 AT 10:00 AM SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DEFT. HAS IFP.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-21-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-08-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
